element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic for enemy defeat throughout game
Ranged attack capability, expands combat options
Environmental puzzle solving, access to alternate routes
Level navigation and fast travel between zones
New mechanic for continuing battle vs King Drool

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate platformer pacing with form-switching breaks to prevent monotony; variety of world themes (prehistoric, dinosaur interior, Chinatown, moon) provide rhythmic environment changes

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus levels accessible via secret paths or power-up combinations
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden transformation routes and alternate paths using size-change and flight mechanics

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to head-smash mechanic and basic platforming; gradual familiarization with controls
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of multiple transformation forms; increased enemy complexity and hazard density; environmental puzzle solving via size/flight mechanics
difficulty_curve.late_game: Increased King Drool encounters; flower mechanic integration; moon setting likely features highest environmental hazards
notable_spikes: King Drool boss encounters across world transitions

notable_level_patterns.description: Game progresses through distinct themed zones (prehistoric → dinosaur interior → modern Chinatown → moon) with associated hazard/enemy types; each transition provides visual and mechanical freshness
Access to certain areas or bonus content requires specific transformations (size, flight, Big Kronk); encourages replaying with different forms
Optional high-difficulty challenge areas accessible throughout; serve as tension relief breakers and skill demonstrations
